caption: In a large, well-lit ballroom with recessed ceiling lighting and ornate chandeliers, a performance takes place on a blue floor in front of a seated audience. A man wearing a black sleeveless shirt and white pants walks across the space, while another person in a light-colored, traditional-style outfit follows behind him. In the background, guests are seated at long tables covered with red cloths. As the sequence progresses, the two performers move toward the right side of the frame. In the final scene, a third person wearing a white outfit enters from the right and walks toward the others. The crowd remains seated in the background, observing the movement. There is no visible on-screen text or logos. The scene shifts from a wider shot of the performers walking in tandem to a closer focus as the third individual joins them on the floor.
